description: Draft parser extracts JSON object even when wrapped by surrounding text and normalizes hashtag prefix format.

input.llm_text:
Here is the result:
{
  "caption": "봄 행사 참여하세요! 🌸\n함께해요",
  "hashtags": ["봄행사", "#지역축제"],
  "overlay_main": "봄행사",
  "overlay_sub": "함께해요",
  "suggested_image_keywords": ["봄", "행사"]
}
Thanks!
